data.title: Consistency Heuristic
data.description: Ensures a consistent user experience across devices and platforms.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhances perceived usability through appealing UI design.

data.title: Feedback Principle
data.description: Provides clear feedback to user actions to enhance interaction.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces decision time by limiting the number of options in menus.

data.title: Recognition over Recall
data.description: Designs interfaces that prioritize user recognition over recall.
